<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"16:9 dynamic handheld cinematic shot in modern editorial style with punchy energy and tactile immediacy inspired by Rhode Skin and Glossier visuals, REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D leans forward intensely into the lens with coiled muscles tensed mid-stride and energetic pacing poised to deliver breaking news, breath held in anticipation looking directly at camera, in airy modern newsroom filled with sleek desks scattered with papers and glowing terminals casting soft screen glows, vast rain-streaked glass wall dominating background framing faint golden hour urban twilight glow beyond, polished floors reflecting warm highlights and subtle rain drips, bright natural window light flooding in with golden hour warmth and high-key airiness, lifted shadows, slight highlight warmth, crisp whites and warm beiges with pops of pink and matte black, shallow depth of field blurring distant bustle into bokeh, anamorphic lens flares adding live broadcast intensity, every texture screenshot-worthy.","negativePrompt":"blurry, deformed, ugly, low resolution, overexposed, underexposed, text, subtitles, holograms, floating interfaces, heavy diffusion, lingering static shots","components":{"sceneDescription":"Live newsroom broadcast starting frame with reporter leaning dynamically into camera amid energetic handheld energy, capturing potential motion in a high-stakes breaking news moment.","subject":"REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D tensed and leaning forward with intense poised energy.","environment":"Airy modern newsroom with sleek desks, glowing terminals, scattered papers, vast rain-streaked glass wall revealing distant urban twilight glow, polished floors.","lighting":"Bright natural golden hour twilight window light flooding in, high-key airy with lifted shadows, slight highlight warmth, screen glows from terminals, punchy editorial contrast.","camera":"Dynamic handheld close-up leaning into lens, shallow depth of field, anamorphic flares, 16:9 framing.","composition":"Tight on reporter with blurred background bustle and environmental depth, foreground punch with bokeh layers.","style":"Modern social-first product photography editorial energy, tactile and screenshot-perfect, Glossier and Rhode Skin inspired clean bright aesthetic.","technical":"Ultra high resolution, intricate textures on fabrics and surfaces, sharp subject focus, film grain subtle.","atmosphere":"Urgent dynamic sensory-sharp with effortlessly cool live broadcast tension, fresh and immediate."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["reporter"],"environmentTag":"modern_newsroom_golden_twilight_rain","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3, #D4536D, #1A1A1A, #E8F4E8","lightingSetup":"bright natural window light golden hour warmth, high-key airy, screen glows","styleTag":"modern_editorial_punchy_handheld"}}
